name: apache-users
title: apache-users
summary: Enumerate usernames on systems with Apache UserDir module
description:
Enumerate usernames on systems with Apache UserDir module
This Perl script will enumerate the usernames on any
system that uses Apache with the UserDir module.

commands.name: apache-users
commands.description: USAGE: apache-users [-h 1.2.3.4] [-l names] [-p 80] [-s (SSL Support 1=true 0=false)] [-e 403 (http code)] [-t threads]

arguments.description: Option present in package usage line for apache-users.
arguments.raw: -users  Option present in package usage line for apache-users.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use apache-users because Enumerate usernames on systems with Apache UserDir module.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use apache-users as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `apache-users [options] [args]` as documented upstream for apache-users.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair apache-users with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `apache-users --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
